title: Slide 9: 3D SPHERES
prompt: Presentation slide 9: "3D SPHERES". A chart of 5 percentage values (60%, 70%, 80%, 90%, 100%). Geometric, axis-aligned. In 3D, lift to a clean bar/column chart on a stage with the title floating above — corporate keynote aesthetic, not naturalistic.
